best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-reg-003 title: validate user registration with duplicate email module: user registration source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: username: testuser, email: test@example.com, password: testpass test steps: 1. register a user with the same email. 2. attempt to register another user with the same email. 3. verify the server rejects the second registration due to duplicate email. expected result: the server should reject the second registration due to a duplicate email.

test case id: tc-api-003 title: ensure api communicates with mysql database module: api source pages: 1 preconditions: test data: test steps: 1. send a query to the api to interact with the mysql database. 2. verify the response from the database matches the expected results. expected result: the api should return correct data from the mysql database.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-matching-process-001 title: validate matching process between two users module: matching source pages: 7 preconditions: two users are registered and have profiles. test data: user 1: profile1, user 2: profile2 test steps: 1. user 2 swipes right on user 1's profile. 2. verify the server saves the preference in the database. 3. user 1 swipes right on user 2's profile. 4. verify the server saves the preference in the database. 5. verify the server checks for a match. 6. verify the server notifies user 1 of a match and opens the chat. 7. verify the application displays the match screen for both users. expected result: both users should be notified of a match and see the match screen.
